title: Amazon Echo (4th Gen) | Premium sound powered by Dolby and Alexa (Black)
description: Ships from Amazon Amazon Ships from Amazon Sold by Clicktech Retail Private Ltd Clicktech Retail Private Ltd Sold by Clicktech Retail Private Ltd Payment Secure transaction Your transaction is secure We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

Weight.text: 970 g ( Actual size and  weight may vary by manufacturing process )

WiFi connectivity.text: Dual-band, dual-antenna WiFi (MIMO) for faster streaming and fewer dropped connections than standard WiFi. Supports 802.11a/b/g/n/ac (2.4 and 5 GHz) networks. Does not support connecting to ad-hoc (or peer-to-peer) WiFi networks.

Smart home connectivity.text: Bluetooth Low Energy Mesh + Zigbee + Sidewalk + Matter controller (Alexa Android app setup only. iOS coming soon)

Bluetooth connectivity.text: Advanced Audio Distribution Profile (A2DP) support for audio streaming from your mobile device to Echo or from Echo to your Bluetooth speaker. Audio/Video Remote Control Profile (AVRCP) for voice control of connected mobile devices. Hands-free voice control is not supported for Mac OS X devices. Direct control of BLE Mesh. Bluetooth speakers requiring PIN codes are not supported.

Audio.text: Built-in speaker for voice feedback. 3.0” (76.2 mm) neodymium woofer and two 0.8” (20 mm) tweeters

Alexa app.text: The Alexa app is compatible with Fire OS, Android, and  iOS devices. Supported operating systems .

Accessibility features.text: The Alexa  app and Alexa-enabled products include several features for customers with  accessibility needs related to vision, hearing, mobility, and speech. Learn  more about Alexa accessibility .

Warranty and service.text: All-new Amazon Echo (4th Gen) is sold with 1-year limited warranty . Use of All-new Amazon Echo is subject to these terms .

Setup technology.text: Amazon WiFi simple setup enables customers to connect smart devices to their WiFi network in a few easy steps. WiFi simple setup is another way Alexa is always getting smarter. Learn more about WiFi simple setup

links.text: Learn more about WiFi simple setup

Included in the box.text: Echo (4th  Gen), power adapter (30W), and Quick Start Guide .

Privacy features.text: Wake word  technology, streaming indicators, microphone off button, the ability to view  and delete your voice recordings, and more. Visit the Alexa Privacy Hub to explore how Alexa  and Echo devices are designed to protect your privacy.

Name and Address of Importer.text: Amazon Wholesale (India) Private Limited. Block E, Unit No. 1401-1421, International Trade Tower, Nehru Place, New Delhi- 110019

Name and Address of Manufacturer.text: Dongguan Tymphany Acoustic Technology Co., Ltd. LIUWU SECT., SANHENG ROAD, XINCHENG DISTRICT, SHEKKIT TOWN DONGGUAN CITY, GUANGDONG PROVINCE, P.R. CHINA

Built-in microphone off button and in-ap.text: Built-in microphone off button and in-app privacy controls

ai_insights.description: Global e-commerce and technology company offering a vast selection of products, digital content, and services through its online platform, as well as cloud computing (AWS) and consumer electronics.
ai_insights.reputation: Generally high customer satisfaction for convenience, selection, and delivery speed; known for market dominance; faces scrutiny regarding labor practices andi-competitive behavior.
ai_insights.other_notes: Operates worldwide with specific regional websites (e.g., Amazon.in for India); also functions as a third-party marketplace for other sellers; continuously expands into new sectors like groceries and healthcare.
